meta.title: Infermatik — Enterprise Content Intelligence Platform
meta.description: Infermatik uses AI to read document, audio, and video content and turn it into structured data. Enterprise content intelligence.

hero.sub: Your documents, audio, and video are read and interpreted with AI, flowing into your decision-making as data.

problem.title: Enterprise content has become an enterprise burden.
problem.intro: Contracts, invoices, customer calls, field video — the volume of content keeps growing, yet valuable data is still extracted with human effort. That is slow, costly, and does not scale.

problems.title: Manual data entry
problems.body: Thousands of documents, recordings, and videos are read by hand and typed into systems.

problems.title: Inconsistent accuracy
problems.body: Fatigue, attention, and person-to-person differences drive high error rates; the process is unpredictable.

problems.title: Processes that do not scale
problems.body: Volume grows but headcount does not. Every new document type means more work.

problems.title: Dark content
problems.body: Recordings and video sit in archives; the information inside is never used.

problems.title: Weak auditability
problems.body: Which decision was based on which content? There is no end-to-end traceability.

problems.title: Complex structures
problems.body: Handwriting, stamps, tables, multi-speaker audio — existing tools fall short.

steps.title: Bring in content
steps.body: Document, audio, or video — single or bulk. Drag-and-drop, API, email, or system integration.

steps.title: Let AI interpret
steps.body: Text is extracted, transcribed, summarized. Structure, intent, and key fields are recognized automatically.

steps.title: Feed your processes
steps.body: Your teams review and approve; data flows cleanly into ERP, CRM, or workflow tools.

capabilities.title: One platform, full content intelligence.
capabilities.intro: Infermatik works across content types with the same template, review, and reporting logic. Set it up once, use it in every department.

items.title: Template management
items.body: Define a template once per content type; Infermatik applies the same extraction consistently, every time.

items.title: Automatic extraction
items.body: Structured data from text, tables, handwriting, audio, and video in seconds.

items.title: Batch processing
items.body: Hundreds of items processed in parallel; retry failures with one click.

items.title: Human-in-the-loop
items.body: AI assists; it does not replace judgment. Every result is reviewed with a full audit trail.

items.title: System integration
items.body: Clean data into SAP, CRM, and workflow systems; real-time webhooks and APIs.

items.title: Reporting
items.body: Template performance, accuracy, STP, and team productivity in one dashboard.

sectors.title: Different content in every sector — one platform.

items.title: Credit & contracts
items.body: Customer data from applications, compliance checks from call recordings.

items.title: Dealer & call center
items.body: Intent and actions from dealer paperwork, stock forms, and call logs.

items.title: Claims files
items.body: Damage triage from photos, video, and expert reports; faster, more consistent.

value.title: Before and after. The difference is measurable.
value.intro: Infermatik is not just speed; it is a traceable, auditable, and safely scalable way of working.
before: Accuracy that depends on the person
Audio and video left as dead weight in the archive
Every new document type means new workload
after: Meaningful signals from every content type
Define templates and scale without limits

pillars.title: Enterprise security
pillars.body: Role-based access, team isolation, centralized identity.

pillars.title: Flexible deployment
pillars.body: Cloud or on‑prem; your data stays under your control.

pillars.title: Full audit trail
pillars.body: Every action and change — with versioning and rollback where needed.

cta.title: Let us plan a demo tailored to your organization.
cta.body: See how Infermatik works on your own documents, audio, and video samples. In a 30-minute session we walk through your use case.

loginPage.metaDescription: Sign in to Infermatik for your organization.
loginPage.title: Sign in
loginPage.subtitle: Use your organization account to continue.
